TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sasait, title = sasait, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sasait} }

S.FORM: sasait u kamu nu Hulam:剪刀 u kamu nu Amilika:scissors
S.PHON: sasait u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:** u kamu nu amir~ɾika:sʦissors

S.PHON: sasait u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:** u kamu nu amir~ɾika:sʦissors
